17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

19 
20 class AppServiceTesterService
21  : public ArcaneAppServiceTesterObject
22 {
23 private:
24 
25  class Test
26  {
27  public:
28  Test() {}
29  void init() {}
30  };
31 
32  class Test2
33  {
34  public:
35  Test2(Arcane::Integer i) : m_i(i) { std::cout << this << " Test2::Test2(" << m_i << ");\n"; }
36  Test2(const Test2& t) : m_i(t.m_i) { std::cout << this << " Test2::Test2(const Test2&);\n"; }
37  ~Test2() { std::cout << this << " Test2::~Test2();\n"; }
38  void init() { std::cout << this << " Test2::init() => i = " << m_i << "\n";}
39  Arcane::Integer get() const { return m_i; }
40  private:
41  Arcane::Integer m_i;
42  };
43 
44 public:
45 
46  AppServiceTesterService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
47  : ArcaneAppServiceTesterObject(sbi) {}
48 
49  ~AppServiceTesterService() {}
50 
51 public:
52 
53  void init() {}
54 
55  Arcane::Integer test();
56 
57 private:
58 
59  // Peut également ętre positionné dans des méthodes, fonctions...
60  ArcGeoSim::OptionalAppService<IGeometryMng> m_geometry;
61 };
62 
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
65 
66 Arcane::Integer
67 AppServiceTesterService::
68 test()
69 {
70  info() << "geometry is available ? : " << m_geometry.isAvailable();
71 
72  if(m_geometry.isAvailable())
73  fatal() << "Error, geometry is not null! please, remove geometry service from use-case";
74 
75  IAppServiceMng* shared = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
76  info() << shared->find<IGeometryMng>(false);
77 
78  if(shared->find<IGeometryMng>(false) != NULL)
79  fatal() << "Error, geometry is not null! please, remove geometry service from use-case";
80 
81  {
82  ArcGeoSim::MutableAppService<IGeometryMng> geometry;
83 
84  geometry = options()->geometry();
85 
86  if(geometry != options()->geometry() ||
87  geometry != shared->find<IGeometryMng>(true))
88  fatal() << "Error, geometry from options, IAppServiceMng and SharedService are differents";
89  }
90 
91  info() << "geometry is available ? : " << m_geometry.isAvailable();
92 
93  if(not m_geometry.isAvailable())
94  fatal() << "Error, geometry is null!";
95 
96  info() << options()->geometry();
97  info() << shared->find<IGeometryMng>(true);
98 
99  if(m_geometry != options()->geometry() ||
100  m_geometry != shared->find<IGeometryMng>(true))
101  fatal() << "Error, geometry from options, IAppServiceMng and OptionalSharedService are differents";
102 
103  {
104  ArcGeoSim::AppService<IGeometryMng> geometry;
105 
106  if(geometry != options()->geometry() ||
107  geometry != shared->find<IGeometryMng>(true))
108  fatal() << "Error, geometry from options, IAppServiceMng and SharedService are differents";
109  }
110 
111  Test t;
112 
113  ArcGeoSim::MutableAppService<Test> test;
114 
115  test = &t;
116 
117  info() << &t;
118  info() << shared->find<Test>(true);
119 
120  if(test != &t ||
121  test != shared->find<Test>(true))
122  fatal() << "Error, test share service, IAppServiceMng and SharedService are differents";
123 
124  // Enregistrement par constructeur de copie d'objet
125  IAppServiceMng* app_services = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
126 
127  app_services->addService(Test2(1234));
128 
129  ArcGeoSim::AppService<Test2> test2;
130 
131  if(test2->get() != 1234)
132  fatal() << "Error, test2 share service, value is not correct";
133 
134  return 1;
135 }
136 
137 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
138 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
139 
140 using namespace Arcane;
141 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_APPSERVICETESTER(AppServiceTester,AppServiceTesterService);
